channel.title: Caramel Latte on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Caramel Latte on Barista At Home

item.title: Iced Caramel Latte Recipe (Better Than Starbucks)
item.description: Make a perfect iced caramel latte at home in 5 minutes — espresso, caramel syrup, cold milk, ice. Exact ratios, Starbucks copycat breakdown, and tips for non-watery results.

item.title: Caramel Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced) — Better Than Coffee Shop
item.description: Make a caramel latte at home with homemade caramel sauce, espresso, and steamed milk. Hot and iced versions, Starbucks copycat ratios, and tips for perfect caramel flavor.
